description:
No CI/CD pipeline exists. The project relies entirely on developers running
'just check' locally.

Fix: Add .github/workflows/ci.yml with:
- Rust fmt-check + clippy + test (native)
- WASM build verification (wasm32-unknown-unknown)
- TypeScript type checking (tsc --noEmit)
- Web build verification (vite build)
- Nix flake check
title: Add CI/CD pipeline
